examples: Do you think it is illegal to run a private columbarium?
The three rows of columbarium have the same geometry, despite the different material used in each one.
The new columbarium establishes a new landmark in the surroundings as it satisfies the need of enlargement the cemetery.
Meanwhile, back at the abbey, there is plenty of room to expand the columbarium.
Shun Tak Holdings, run by a casino-magnate, Stanley Ho, is constructing a columbarium that will provide around 50, 000 niches.
